domain: packaging machinery, labeling, bottle filling, cap handling, and production-line change parts

ideas.idea_title: Starwheel pocket insert for round bottle indexing
ideas.product_context: Rotary bottle filling or labeling machine handling small cylindrical bottles
ideas.core_function: Captures each bottle body in a shaped pocket and spaces bottles accurately as they pass a filler or labeler
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined replaceable starwheel segment with concave bottle pockets, hub mounting holes, and timing-key features
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires repeated radial pocket geometry, circular indexing, blended concave contact surfaces, bolt patterns, and controlled clearances around a rotating path

ideas.idea_title: Neck guide rail for trigger-spray bottle transfer
ideas.product_context: Packaging line change part used when transferring bottles with narrow necks and wider shoulders
ideas.core_function: Supports and guides bottles by the neck while preventing wobble during conveyor movement
ideas.likely_main_part: Long contoured guide rail with a bottle-neck channel, offset mounting bosses, and relieved sections for shoulder clearance
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines a long swept profile, asymmetric clearance cuts, mounting geometry along a rail, and tolerance-sensitive channel dimensions

ideas.idea_title: Nozzle centering cone for multi-head liquid filler
ideas.product_context: Bottle filling station where fill nozzles must enter bottle mouths without striking the rim
ideas.core_function: Funnels bottle mouths into alignment beneath a descending fill nozzle
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined tapered centering cup with internal cone, nozzle clearance bore, drain groove, and flange mounting holes
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests internal tapered surfaces, concentric bores, flange features, annular grooves, and sanitary drainage details

ideas.idea_title: Cap chute escapement finger for flip-top caps
ideas.product_context: Cap handling system feeding asymmetric plastic flip-top caps from a chute to a pick head
ideas.core_function: Releases one cap at a time while holding the next cap back in the chute
ideas.likely_main_part: Narrow machined escapement finger with stepped cap-contact nose, pivot hole, spring slot, and side reliefs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires small functional contact geometry, pivot relationships, thin sections, slots, stepped profiles, and non-generic cap-specific shape constraints

ideas.idea_title: Label peel-plate tip for wraparound label applicator
ideas.product_context: Pressure-sensitive labeler applying wraparound labels to bottles or jars
ideas.core_function: Separates the label from the backing web at a precise sharp edge before application
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined peel plate with a thin beveled nose, web guide grooves, countersunk mounting holes, and datum edge
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin-edge modeling, bevel control, flatness-critical surfaces, small grooves, and accurately located fastener features

ideas.idea_title: Bottle anti-rotation clamp jaw for front-back labeling
ideas.product_context: Labeling machine that must hold oval or rectangular bottles still during label placement
ideas.core_function: Clamps a bottle side profile lightly to prevent rotation while labels are applied
ideas.likely_main_part: Contoured clamp jaw insert with bottle-profile contact face, dovetail mount, compression pad recesses, and locating dowel holes
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests organic product-contact contours, replaceable insert features, dovetail geometry, recessed pad pockets, and mirrored functional surfaces

ideas.idea_title: Auger timing screw for pouch or bottle infeed
ideas.product_context: Small production line that spaces containers before filling, capping, or labeling
ideas.core_function: Gradually separates incoming containers into equal pitch using a helical groove
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined feed screw with variable-pitch helical channel, shaft journals, drive keyway, and end-retaining features
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Pushes representation of helical geometry, pitch transitions, cylindrical datum features, keyways, and container-specific groove profiles

ideas.idea_title: Capper chuck insert for ribbed screw caps
ideas.product_context: Semi-automatic or rotary capper applying plastic screw caps to bottles
ideas.core_function: Grips the outside ribs of a cap while transmitting torque without crushing it
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical chuck liner with internal rib-matching serrations, tapered lead-in, retaining groove, and axial split relief
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires internal repeated serrations, taper transitions, grooves, split features, and torque-contact geometry inside a cylindrical part

ideas.idea_title: Puck nest for unstable cosmetic bottle
ideas.product_context: Conveyor puck system carrying tapered or oval cosmetic bottles through filling and labeling stations
ideas.core_function: Holds a non-round bottle upright and repeatably oriented on a moving conveyor
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined conveyor puck with shaped bottle cavity, orientation flat, underside conveyor engagement groove, and RFID pocket
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests deep nested cavities, non-circular bottle profiles, underside features, datum orientation, and multi-sided machining assumptions

ideas.idea_title: Label roll core adapter with web tension hub
ideas.product_context: Label applicator using different label-roll core diameters across production runs
ideas.core_function: Adapts a label roll to the machine spindle while maintaining concentricity and frictional tension
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped expanding hub adapter with tapered wedges, radial expansion slots, center bore, and knurled tension collar interface
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines concentric stepped diameters, radial slots, wedge tapers, collar interfaces, and assembly-aware clearance features
